use_cases: Displaying structured datasets with animated row hover effects in dashboards
Creating interactive data tables with proximity-based highlighting for better UX
Building responsive table views for SaaS applications and admin panels
Implementing sortable, filterable table interfaces with smooth transitions
Displaying financial or analytics data with visual polish and hover feedback
ai_summary: A sophisticated React data table component with proximity hover effects and spring-based animations. Built with Framer Motion for smooth transitions, it features scroll-aware row highlighting and modern minimalist styling. Ideal for dashboards, admin panels, and data-rich applications requiring interactive table views with polished animations.
